summary: Load HuggingFace medical-cases dataset into PostgreSQL via Flyway-managed schema
Persist 5 HF columns + server columns (id, split, embedding, fts, created_at)
Specialty filter uses exact 13 medical_specialty labels verbatim
All embeddings routed through mandatory EmbeddingEndpointPool; >=1 endpoint required; fail fast at startup if empty
Flyway schema: medical_case table, HNSW cosine index, GIN tsvector, specialty + trigram indexes
MCP surface: 5 tools, 2 resources, 1 prompt, 0 completions — dataset fields only
Two-pass dataset load: pass 1 insert rows, pass 2 backfill embeddings; idempotent on restart
search_cases tool: FTS across sample_name, description, transcription, keywords with optional specialty/split filter and limit
get_case tool: fetch full MedicalCase by 24-char hex id
semantic_search tool: embed query via nomic-embed-text v1.5, pgvector HNSW cosine, optional specialty pre-filter, topK, minSimilarity
list_specialties tool: 13 labels with row counts
get_dataset_stats tool + medical://stats resource: totals, bySpecialty, bySplit; Caffeine cached 60s
medical://cases/{id} resource: full case by id
case-analysis prompt: inject dataset fields; focus options description|transcription|keywords|specialty|all
Embedding input text: {sampleName}. {description} {keywords} — omit keywords when null; exclude transcription
Spring Modulith package modules with explicit allowedDependencies; verify() in CI
Interface/impl separation: service/ + repository/ public; impl/ has @Service/@Repository; mcp never imports *.impl.*
Optional prompt-lab profile (M9/M10): promptlab module, ReAct prompts, label normalization, eval on validation, gate on test
